top_signals.title: Oil Tankers Continue to Change Course After Houthi Threats
top_signals.summary: Four tankers changed course in the Red Sea on Wednesday, with two signalling the Suez Canal as their new destination after Yemen's Houthi militia warned ships to avoid sailing to Saudi Arabian ports, ship-tracking data showed.The Iran-aligned…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crop Prices Hit 3-Year High as Black Sea Attacks, Heat Stoke Food Inflation
top_signals.summary: Crop prices rose to a three-year high as heat waves and escalating attacks in the Black Sea threaten to disrupt global grain trade, reviving risks to food inflation that have also been stoked by the war in Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Philippines, China Butt Heads Over Encounter in the South China Sea
top_signals.summary: The foreign ministers of the Philippines and China met in Manila on Wednesday and both made "strong" protests over an encounter between the two countries' vessels this week in contested South China Sea waters.The Philippine foreign affairs secretary…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Swiss rail giant Stadler rejects $12.3M ransom demand after cyberattack
top_signals.summary: Swiss rail vehicle manufacturer Stadler Rail says the Everest ransomware gang demanded about $12.3 million after breaching a data exchange platform shared with one of its suppliers. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New Kimsuky campaign compromised South Korean software vendors
top_signals.summary: A North Korean advanced persistent threat (APT) group recently targeted vendors of collaborative-work software, South Korean researchers said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New Pipelines Set To Ease Permian Natural Gas Glut
top_signals.summary: The regional price of natural gas produced in the Permian, the top U.S. oil basin, was negative for most of the first half of the year. Rising associated gas output from oil-targeting wells has had nowhere to go. Producers had to either flare the gas, within allowed limits, or pay to get rid of what many Permian players see as an undesirable by-product of the valuable crude. For years, the key constraint to local gas prices has been the insufficient pipeline takeaway capacity, which hasn’t grown in lockstep with the soaring gas production…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Google burns through $6bn in cash as AI spending climbs again
top_signals.summary: Search giant says it will commit up to $205bn to AI investments in 2026
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ServiceNow CEO defends the company's relevancy, touting a kill switch for rogue AI agents
top_signals.summary: ServiceNow CEO Bill McDermott said the company is becoming increasingly important as businesses deploy more autonomous AI agents.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: New British prime minister gains early defense win with Canada fighter jet tie-up
top_signals.summary: Canada has joined the GCAP fighter program as an observer, marking the first expansion beyond the founding members Britain, Italy and Japan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Korea’s Mirae Asset completes acquisition of Korbit crypto exchange
top_signals.summary: Mirae Asset also plans to increase its stake from 92.06% to 97.15% through an additional deal later this week, local media reported.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Commission concludes eligibility checks for two European Citizens' Initiatives on digital identity and age-verification, and on migration and asylum
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 22 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission concluded the eligibility checks for the registration requests of two European Citizens' Initiatives (ECIs) entitled: ‘Stop Killing The Internet: No Digital ID & No Age Verification' and ‘Save Europe Act'.

alerts.title: SEC reaches settlement with Coinbase over records requests from Gensler era
alerts.summary: The SEC reached a settlement with Coinbase on Wednesday, ending a years-long legal dispute over the agency's handling of records requests.

alerts.title: Lessons Learned from CISA’s Recent GitHub Leak
alerts.summary: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has issued a postmortem on a data leak in which a contractor published dozens of internal CISA credentials -- including AWS Govcloud keys -- in a public GitHub repository for almost six months before being notified by KrebsOnSecurity. Experts say the gaps identified in the agency's initial response provide important lessons that all security teams should absorb.
